reviews.comment:
Minimercado, combustibles líquidos atencion super rapida. Es una estacion de servicio!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Mini-market, liquid fuels, super fast service. It's a gas station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJaHAtamdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta bien. Tiene pocas bocas expendedoras de nafta, lo que lo hace un poco lento y por otro lado, hay poco personal atendiendo...esta en una zona céntrica de la ciudad, asi que es normal que haya cola de autos. No hay que ir apurado. No tienen los surtidores nuevos asi que si llenas 700$ por ejemplo, te pueden poner 701 o 705$...ojo!

(Translated by Google)
It's okay. It has few gas pumps, which makes it a bit slow, and there aren't many staff members...it's in a central area of ​​the city, so it's normal to have a line of cars. Don't be in a hurry. They don't have the new pumps, so if you fill up with $700 worth of gas, for example, they might put in $701 or $705 worth...be careful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJdklUeDFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El aca de La Plata me resulta práctico y rápido, para cargar combustible en el centro, por la cantidad de surtidores que tienen y nunca tuve problemas con los playeros con la atención, aparte tiene una oficina para sacar el carnet internacional para conducir en el extranjero, lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
The ACA station in La Plata is practical and quick for filling up downtown, thanks to the number of pumps they have, and I've never had any problems with the attendants' service. Plus, they have an office for getting an international driving permit. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJdC1MSXJ3RRAB
